---
title: "test_muninn.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\crucible\test_muninn.py"
loc: 41
complexity: 3
logic_score: 3.80
style_score: 3.67
intel_score: 9.20
overall_score: 4.83
---

## Intent
The `test_muninn.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on TestMuninnDaemon, test_deterministic_command_routing, test_uplink_fallback_on_low_confidence, test_sleep_protocol_persistence. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via TestMuninnDaemon, test_deterministic_command_routing, test_uplink_fallback_on_low_confidence, test_sleep_protocol_persistence. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 3.8/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.2/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 14 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [unittest](file://unittest)
- [asyncio](file://asyncio)
- [json](file://json)
- [os](file://os)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [unittest.mock](file://unittest.mock)
- [src.cstar.core.daemon](file://src.cstar.core.daemon)
- [src.cstar.core.daemon](file://src.cstar.core.daemon)
- [src.cstar.core.daemon](file://src.cstar.core.daemon)
- [src.cstar.core.daemon](file://src.cstar.core.daemon)

### Exports
- `TestMuninnDaemon`
- `test_deterministic_command_routing`
- `test_uplink_fallback_on_low_confidence`
- `test_sleep_protocol_persistence`
